headlines.headline: Pleven Trading Co faces regulatory review of wireless connectivity practices

sentiment.reasoning: Regulatory reviews introduce significant downside risk and uncertainty regarding potential fines or operational restrictions.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
